description: Binary assertion eval suite for blog-writer skill. Each assertion must be true or false — no partial credit. Run each test prompt 3 times and report pass rate. If pass rate < 100%, make one change to skill.md and retest.

test_prompts.prompt: Write a blog post about VA loan myths Jacksonville FL
test_prompts.expected: A complete HTML blog post targeting VA loan buyers in Jacksonville

test_prompts.prompt: Write a blog post about best neighborhoods for families in Jacksonville
test_prompts.expected: A complete HTML blog post covering family-friendly Jacksonville neighborhoods

test_prompts.prompt: Write a blog post about how to sell your home fast in Orange Park FL
test_prompts.expected: A complete HTML blog post targeting home sellers in Orange Park

test_prompts.prompt: Write a blog post about first-time homebuyer programs in Florida 2026
test_prompts.expected: A complete HTML blog post about FL homebuyer programs with local Jacksonville context

test_prompts.prompt: Write a blog post about moving to Jacksonville from out of state
test_prompts.expected: A complete HTML blog post about relocating to Jacksonville

assertions.description: Output contains the correct phone number
Output contains the correct email
Google Tag Manager container is present
Canonical URL points to keneshiahaye.com
HTML has a <title> tag
Title tag includes Keneshia Haye brand name
HTML has a meta description tag
FAQPage JSON-LD schema is present
Article JSON-LD schema is present
BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema is present
Post links to contact.html or /contact
Post has at least 3 internal links to site pages
assertions.check: HTML output contains at least 3 href attributes pointing to .html pages or internal paths

assertions.description: Post contains a visible FAQ section
assertions.check: HTML output contains a section or div with FAQ-related heading (FAQ, Frequently Asked)

assertions.description: Post has a mid-article call to action
assertions.check: HTML output contains a CTA element before the FAQ section and after the first H2
assertions.note: Verify CTA box appears in the middle of article content, not just at the end

assertions.description: Post has an end-of-article call to action
assertions.check: HTML output contains a CTA or consultation link near the end of <main>
assertions.note: Verify CTA exists after the FAQ section

assertions.description: Body tag has dark mode classes
assertions.check: HTML output contains 'dark:bg-navy-500' in body tag or class attribute

assertions.description: All nav links use ../ relative paths (blog subdirectory requirement)
assertions.check: HTML nav links use '../' not absolute paths to site pages

assertions.description: No Unsplash CDN links in the output
assertions.check: HTML output does NOT contain 'unsplash.com' or 'images.unsplash'

assertions.description: Output does not use 'In today's market' opener
assertions.check: HTML content does NOT contain 'In today\'s market'

assertions.description: Output does not use the generic first-time buyer boilerplate opener
assertions.check: HTML content does NOT contain 'Whether you\'re a first-time buyer'

assertions.description: Post mentions Jacksonville (local geo-relevance)
assertions.check: HTML content body contains 'Jacksonville' at least once

assertions.description: Post has at least one H2 heading
Post includes an author bio section for Keneshia
assertions.check: HTML output contains 'Keneshia' in an author bio context near the end of <main>

assertions.description: Post includes the correct office address
Post loads the site stylesheet

improvement_instructions: If any assertion fails: (1) identify which step in skill.md could produce this failure, (2) make ONE targeted change to skill.md — either tightening a rule, adding an explicit requirement, or reordering a checklist item, (3) rerun the full eval, (4) if score improved, git commit the change with message 'eval: improve skill.md - [assertion fixed]', (5) if score dropped, git reset and try a different change. Never stop until all 25 assertions pass across all 5 test prompts.
